name: K-12 public school districts
eligibility: Generally eligible when the district is an agency or instrumentality of state/local government. Validate charter school status by state.
contacts: Superintendent, CTO/CIO, IT Director, Business Officer, Grants Director, Procurement Officer

name: County governments
eligibility: Local government subrecipient; often coordinated through county emergency management, IT, public safety, or commissioners.
contacts: County Administrator, CIO/IT Director, Emergency Manager, Public Safety Director, Finance/Grants

name: Cities, towns, townships, municipalities
eligibility: Local government subrecipient; often key to 80% local pass-through and 25% rural pass-through.
contacts: City Manager, Mayor/Administrator, IT Director, Clerk, Finance Director, Police/Fire leadership

name: Public higher education
eligibility: Generally eligible when a public institution is an agency or instrumentality of state/local government.
contacts: CIO/CISO, VP Administration, Procurement, Grants Office, Public Safety

name: Public health, EMS, public safety, and emergency communications
eligibility: Eligible when operated by a local government, special district, authority, or public entity.
contacts: Emergency Manager, EMS Director, 911 Director, Health Director, IT/security lead

name: Public libraries and community authorities
eligibility: Eligible when structured as public entities, local authorities, districts, or instrumentalities.
contacts: Library Director, Board Chair, IT Coordinator, Finance/Grants

name: Special districts, utilities, water/wastewater, ports, transit
eligibility: Eligible where they are local public authorities, special districts, intrastate districts, or public instrumentalities.
contacts: General Manager, Operations Director, OT/IT lead, Finance/Grants, Board liaison

name: Councils of government and regional entities
eligibility: Can aggregate local government needs and support regional projects where state guidance allows.
contacts: Executive Director, Regional Planner, IT lead, Grant Manager

name: Tribal governments / authorized tribal organizations
eligibility: May appear as SLCGP subrecipients in some state processes; note that Tribal Cybersecurity Grant Program is a separate direct tribal funding path.
contacts: Tribal Administrator, IT Director, Emergency Manager, Finance/Grants
